user_query: My friend lives in Mississauga, about an hour from downtown. What days are without any work commitments or flights?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 9 contains only leisure activities (brunch, shopping, walking tours, dinner) and has no work-related items or any flights.
Day 8 is a full-day leisure excursion (Niagara Falls day trip and dining) with no work commitments or flights listed.
